request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we stood strong with our allies? Those days are fading fast. New reports show our partners aren't pulling their weight, leaving us vulnerable. We can't afford to be the world's policeman while others shirk their duties. It's time to put America first and demand real commitment from our allies. Our security can't wait. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
